notes: Works out of the box. Since it's a unity game I had to lower details to low, then restart and then change the details to higher levels to get good performance (this thing affects unity games like Subnautica, Planet Nomads, etc)
title: Mutant Football League

notes: I reported before that the players were missing. That error has been fixed, and it now plays perfectly with no modifications.
